questionHtml: Using a PPC diagram, explain the impact of the damage to the major buildings in Beirut on Lebanon’s productive capacity (Text D, paragraph [2]).
markschemeHtml:
Candidates who incorrectly label diagrams can be awarded a maximum of [3].

For a PPC, the axes could be two alternative products, one on each axis, e.g. Good A & Good B or Schools & Motor Cars; or two groups of products, e.g. Consumer Goods and Producer Goods.

meta.title: Using a PPC diagram, explain the impact of the damage to the major buildings in Beirut on Lebanon’s productive capacity (Text D, paragraph [2]).
